## Broadcom Stock Seen Cheap on Cash Flow but Expensive on Earnings Multiple

No new fundamental signal; the cash flow versus earnings multiple divergence may reflect post-VMware integration dynamics and heavy capex cycling, but this headline adds nothing beyond existing consensus framing.

- Valuation analysis flags AVGO as inexpensive on cash flow metrics but relatively pricey on an earnings basis.
- No new business, product, or strategy information provided.
